commit.message:
fix: capture external command output before piping to Select-Object

Piping gh --version to Select-Object -First 1 terminates the pipeline
early, which kills the gh process and sets LASTEXITCODE=1 even when
gh is working fine. Fix: capture full output first, then format.

T03 was failing despite gh being installed and T04/T05 passing.
Same pattern fixed in T13 (was masked by the -or fallback).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove em dashes from install.ps1 - PS5.1 tokenizer bug

PS5.1's tokenizer miscounts bytes when a multi-byte UTF-8 character
(U+2014 em dash) appears in a double-quoted string. This corrupts the
parser state and causes every here-string after it to fail with 'An
empty pipe element is not allowed' errors (lines 260-281).

Three em dashes removed (lines 76, 208, 308). Replaced with hyphens.
PS5.1 parse error count: 37 -> 0.

fix: intelligent LLM routing + AC iteration improvements

- Add resolve_model_for_agent() for task-type based model routing:
  * Code agents (dev/worker/brain/infra/qa) → gpt-5.2-codex
  * Reasoning agents (architect/critic/reviewer) → gpt-5.2
  * Others → DEFAULT_MODEL (gpt-5-mini for fast tasks)
- Increase MAX_ADVERSARIAL_RETRIES from 2 to 3 (4 attempts total)
- Add retry_count: 3 on adversarial-review phase in feature-sprint
- Server startup now syncs agents with intelligent routing

Problem: All agents were using gpt-5-mini which produces lower quality
code, causing adversarial guard rejections (L1 hallucination, truncated
code, missing schemas).

Solution: Route code-producing agents to gpt-5.2-codex which has better
code generation capabilities. Combined with more retries, this allows
the AC iteration loop to improve output until quality threshold is met.

commit.message:
fix: tests-exist check now finds Python test files

The glob pattern only matched JS/TS files (*.test.{ts,js}).
Python projects with test_*.py or *_test.py files always failed
the tests-exist check even when tests existed.

Now matches: *.test.{ts,js,tsx,jsx}, test_*.py, *_test.py
Also ignores .venv/ and __pycache__/.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add tracing, testkit, migration, crypto, and email packages

- tracing: OpenTelemetry helpers with TracerProvider setup, span utilities,
  HTTP middleware, context propagation, and configurable exporters
- testkit: shared test helpers including JSON assertions, mock HTTP server,
  CallRecorder, and structural equality helpers
- migration: DB migration runner using pgx with mockable DB interface,
  Migrate/Rollback/Status operations, and schema_migrations tracking table
- crypto: bcrypt password hashing/verification, secure random token gen,
  HMAC-SHA256 signing, constant-time comparison, and rehash detection
- email: SMTP mailer with HTML/text multipart support, template rendering
  helpers, CC/BCC, custom headers, and configurable auth

All packages: go vet passes, go test -race passes, 97% total coverage.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
